title: gluta torquata
intro: Gluta torquata, also known as the ironwood tree, is a species of plant in the family Anacardiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gluta torquata include its ability to reduce fever, treat various infections, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in folk medicine in various parts of the world.
